calendar.matters:
Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate In Part Order Of February 23, 2007 And Granting Motion For Order To Distribute Settlement Funds, Pursuant To C.C.P 473
Off Calendar Aug-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Plaintiff's Motion to vacate, in part, Feb. 22, 2007 Order Granting Distribution of Settlement Funds hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Jenelle Moulyn, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Courtney McClellan, et al.
No appearance by the Plaintiffs.
After hearing the testimony of counsel and considering of moving papers and evidence presented, Plaintiff's Motion is granted and signed in open court, see scanned doc. for details of the Order.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Feb-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Kimberly Williams, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Courtney McClellan, ind. and as Successor in Interest to Jim White and Carol White, deceased; and Jessica Semsem (present), Courtney McClellan (present), and Michelle Looney, as Legal Heirs of Jim White, deceased.
Parties were sworn and give testimony.
After hearing the testimony, considering of the evidence and declartions presented, the Court taken the matter under submission, Blank Proposed Order submitted in court.

Feb. 23, 2007
Order granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan, see scanned doc for details of Order.
